data.name: A_folder_cannot_be_moved_into_itself_59adb3b1
data.value: A folder cannot be moved into itself.

data.name: All_options_for_interface_gallery_and_image_view_1f47eb77
data.value: All options for interface, gallery, and image viewing.

data.name: Alle_Optionen_f_r_Oberfl_che_Galerie_und_Bildans_571dd265
data.value: All options for interface, gallery, and image viewing.

data.name: An_item_with_this_name_already_exists_90c60037
data.value: An item with this name already exists.

data.name: Bestimmt_die_Gr_e_von_Elementen_in_der_Benutzero_994e460b
data.value: Controls the size of interface elements.

data.name: Bestimmt_die_JPEG_Qualit_t_neu_erzeugter_zwische_a025cc32
data.value: Controls the JPEG quality of newly generated cached thumbnails.

data.name: Bestimmt_welcher_Ordner_beim_Start_der_Anwendung_0b03a132
data.value: Controls which folder is opened when the application starts.

data.name: Blendet_die_rechte_Metadatenleiste_ein_oder_aus_9edf5d5a
data.value: Shows or hides the right metadata sidebar.

data.name: Blendet_in_der_Galerie_zus_tzlich_einen_Eintrag__4af3527c
data.value: Also shows an entry for the parent folder in the gallery.

data.name: Choose_an_accent_color_for_highlights_and_active_7bff5178
data.value: Choose an accent color for highlights and active elements.

data.name: Controls_density_and_visible_interface_elements_4fce3a15
data.value: Controls density and visible interface elements.

data.name: Controls_how_images_are_displayed_when_opened_c5f2a407
data.value: Controls how images are displayed when opened.

data.name: Controls_the_size_of_interface_elements_5b7204d6
data.value: Controls the size of interface elements.

data.name: Controls_which_mode_is_used_when_FerrumPix_is_op_4eb9747d
data.value: Controls which mode is used when FerrumPix is opened with an image parameter.

data.name: Der_Dateiname_enth_lt_ung_ltige_Zeichen_9ff28619
data.value: The file name contains invalid characters.

data.name: Der_Ordnername_enth_lt_ung_ltige_Zeichen_065fbefc
data.value: The folder name contains invalid characters.

data.name: Ein_Element_mit_diesem_Namen_existiert_bereits_84e054cd
data.value: An item with this name already exists.

data.name: Ein_Ordner_kann_nicht_in_sich_selbst_verschoben__08ab887c
data.value: A folder cannot be moved into itself.

data.name: Eine_Datei_mit_diesem_Namen_existiert_bereits_M__915f206b
data.value: A file with this name already exists. Do you really want to overwrite the existing file?

data.name: Einstellungen_f_r_die_Ordner_und_Dateiansicht_im_2750e4f3
data.value: Settings for the folder and file view in the sidebar.

data.name: Entfernt_Metadaten_Bewertungen_Favoriten_Tags_vo_e5f7741e
data.value: Removes metadata (ratings, favorites, tags) from images that no longer exist.

data.name: ffne_ein_Bild_aus_dem_Betrachter_1ae5a15b
data.value: Open an image from the viewer

data.name: ffnet_Bilder_skaliert_auf_die_verf_gbare_Fenster_0f9fbb39
data.value: Opens images scaled to the available window area instead of original size.

data.name: Grundlegende_Einstellungen_f_r_Startverhalten_un_2c001b64
data.value: Basic settings for startup behavior and language.

data.name: Legt_fest_auf_welchem_Bildschirm_die_gew_hlte_Sk_dde40652
data.value: Controls which screen the selected scaling is applied to.

data.name: Legt_fest_welcher_Modus_verwendet_wird_wenn_Ferr_915824a3
data.value: Controls which mode is used when FerrumPix is opened with an image parameter.

data.name: Legt_fest_wie_Bilder_beim_ffnen_dargestellt_werd_83b8aead
data.value: Controls how images are displayed when opened.

data.name: Legt_fest_wie_lange_ein_Bild_in_der_Diashow_sich_09664a6a
data.value: Controls how long an image remains visible in the slideshow.

data.name: nderung_wird_nach_einem_Neustart_aktiv_d994f6d3
data.value: Change takes effect after a restart.

data.name: Open_an_image_from_the_viewer_0d677338
data.value: Open an image from the viewer

data.name: Opens_images_scaled_to_the_available_window_area_421d65a2
data.value: Opens images scaled to the available window area instead of original size.

data.name: Ordner_kann_nicht_in_sich_selbst_verschoben_werd_c874e142
data.value: A folder cannot be moved into itself.

data.name: Select_a_folder_in_the_sidebar_7f9e356f
data.value: Select a folder in the sidebar

data.name: Select_an_image_from_the_gallery_5b557a0b
data.value: Select an image from the gallery

data.name: Settings_for_the_folder_and_file_view_in_the_sid_98ffff27
data.value: Settings for the folder and file view in the sidebar.

data.name: Shows_folders_whose_name_starts_with_a_dot_for_e_b9da2300
data.value: Shows folders whose name starts with a dot (for example .config, .local).

data.name: Shows_subfolders_next_to_images_double_click_ope_45a64218
data.value: Shows subfolders next to images; double-click opens the folder.

data.name: Shows_the_breadcrumb_above_the_file_list_c7baf540
data.value: Shows the breadcrumb above the file list.

data.name: Shows_the_image_strip_at_the_bottom_of_the_edito_dc3934aa
data.value: Shows the image strip at the bottom of the editor.

data.name: Shows_the_image_strip_at_the_bottom_of_the_viewe_bf6b2029
data.value: Shows the image strip at the bottom of the viewer.

data.name: Shows_the_tab_bar_in_the_main_window_4cba4d0b
data.value: Shows the tab bar in the main window.

data.name: Skaliert_die_komplette_Oberfl_che_beim_n_chsten__57d3635a
data.value: Scales the entire interface on the next start.

data.name: Speichert_Vorschaubilder_auf_dem_Ger_t_damit_Ord_da808761
data.value: Stores thumbnails on the device so folders load faster the next time they are opened.

data.name: Steuert_die_Darstellung_der_Oberfl_che_und_die_s_0c165951
data.value: Controls the interface appearance and visible controls.

data.name: Steuert_die_Gr_enwirkung_und_die_sichtbaren_Bedi_160c94ad
data.value: Controls density and visible interface elements.

data.name: The_file_name_contains_invalid_characters_adc33b68
data.value: The file name contains invalid characters.

data.name: Uses_rounded_corners_for_windows_and_controls_89d473a7
data.value: Uses rounded corners for windows and controls.

data.name: Uses_the_system_language_by_default_falls_back_t_e568e099
data.value: Uses the system language by default; falls back to English if unsupported.

data.name: Verschieben_Modus_ein_oder_ausschalten_f8deeb6b
data.value: Turn move mode on or off

data.name: Versteckte_Ordner_k_nnen_hier_nicht_erstellt_wer_8128a80d
data.value: Hidden folders cannot be created here.

data.name: Verwendet_abgerundete_Ecken_f_r_Fenster_und_Bedi_68ea06e4
data.value: Uses rounded corners for windows and controls.

data.name: Verwendet_standardm_ig_die_Systemsprache_falls_n_eb8ed68d
data.value: Uses the system language by default; falls back to English if unsupported.

data.name: Vorschau_mit_den_aktuellen_Einstellungen_neu_ber_f37c3c48
data.value: Recalculate preview with the current settings

data.name: W_hle_ein_Bild_aus_der_Galerie_fbdad853
data.value: Select an image from the gallery

data.name: W_hle_einen_Ordner_in_der_Sidebar_8c51f4b6
data.value: Select a folder in the sidebar

data.name: W_hlen_Sie_eine_Akzentfarbe_f_r_Hervorhebungen_u_d658f955
data.value: Choose an accent color for highlights and active elements.

data.name: Wird_f_r_das_Speichern_und_Exportieren_als_JPG_v_614ce77a
data.value: Used for saving and exporting as JPG.

data.name: Zeigt_den_Navigationspfad_ber_der_Dateiliste_an_f3fc97a0
data.value: Shows the breadcrumb above the file list.

data.name: Zeigt_die_Bildleiste_am_unteren_Rand_des_Editors_3e30b75c
data.value: Shows the image strip at the bottom of the editor.

data.name: Zeigt_die_Bildleiste_am_unteren_Rand_des_Viewers_108721b7
data.value: Shows the image strip at the bottom of the viewer.

data.name: Zeigt_die_Registerkartenleiste_im_Hauptfenster_a_13a6d0a8
data.value: Shows the tab bar in the main window.

data.name: Zeigt_Ordner_an_deren_Name_mit_einem_Punkt_begin_c6e56c44
data.value: Shows folders whose name starts with a dot (for example .config, .local).

data.name: Zeigt_Unterordner_neben_Bildern_an_Doppelklick_f_6344f95c
data.value: Shows subfolders next to images; double-click opens the folder.

data.name: Klicke_ins_Bild_oder_nutze_um_eine_Textebene_anz_1999bb75
data.value: Click on the image or use + to create a text layer.

data.name: Legt_fest_ob_die_Galerie_als_Raster_oder_als_Lis_aa0783b1
data.value: Determines whether the gallery is displayed as a grid or as a list.

data.name: Auswahl_mit_der_gew_hlten_F_llung_f_llen_a95e0844
data.value: Fill the selection with the chosen fill

data.name: Auswahlinhalt_als_neues_frei_verschiebbares_Bild_51de7eb5
data.value: Copy selection content as a new, freely movable image object

data.name: Bildgr_e_auf_die_Vorschau_anwenden_31e8307b
data.value: Apply image size to the preview

data.name: Die_ausgew_hlten_Bilder_werden_als_Collage_im_ak_2b3be65b
data.value: The selected images will be saved as a collage in the current folder.

data.name: Gaussian_gleichm_iges_Weichzeichnen_Median_kante_72b86f62
data.value: Gaussian: uniform blur. Median: edge-preserving, true noise reduction.

data.name: Info_Seitenleiste_im_Viewer_anzeigen_cc2961cd
data.value: Show info sidebar in the viewer

data.name: Klicke_in_der_Vorschau_auf_ein_Bild_um_es_als_He_6f81d7cd
data.value: Click an image in the preview to set it as the hero.

data.name: Klicke_ins_Bild_oder_nutze_die_Werkzeugleiste_ob_f980bfd7
data.value: Click into the image or use the toolbar above.

data.name: Legt_fest_wie_transparente_Bildbereiche_in_Viewe_a5cb2c2b
data.value: Sets how transparent image areas are displayed in the viewer and editor.

data.name: Leinwandgr_e_auf_die_Vorschau_anwenden_e0bd6463
data.value: Apply canvas size to the preview

data.name: Linksklick_Punkt_hinzuf_gen_verschieben_Rechtskl_f81ffcf7
data.value: Left click: add/move point. Right click: remove point.

data.name: Nutzt_die_Grafikhardware_zur_Videodekodierung_Be_164b727e
data.value: Uses the graphics hardware for video decoding. Disable (software decoding) if video playback shows visual glitches. Takes effect the next time a video is opened.

data.name: Rechteck_im_Bild_aufziehen_dann_kopieren_oder_f__3bbaa302
data.value: Drag a rectangle on the image, then copy or fill it.

data.name: Reihenfolge_der_Bilder_und_im_Zufallsmodus_Gr_e__4c5c48c1
data.value: Reshuffle the order of the images (and, in random mode, size/rotation)

data.name: Schachbrettmuster_Standard_echt_durchsichtig_ode_bdf3665e
data.value: Checkerboard pattern (default), true transparency, or a solid color.

data.name: Text_QR_Inhalt_oder_Symbol_eingeben_34279b33
data.value: Enter text, QR content, or symbol

data.name: Vergr_ert_die_Leinwand_beim_Ausrichten_so_dass_k_212f0168
data.value: Enlarges the canvas when straightening so no image corners are cropped, instead of zooming into the image to compensate.

data.name: mpv_ist_auf_diesem_System_nicht_installiert_d7891620
data.value: mpv is not installed on this system

data.name: Wei_er_Hintergrundfarbe_Rahmen_um_jedes_einzelne_fae3eef2
data.value: White (background color) border around each individual image

data.name: W_hle_unten_einen_Objekttyp_aus_und_klicke_dann__4add2974
data.value: Choose an object type below, then click into the image to place it there.

data.name: Bitte_behebe_Namenskonflikte_oder_ung_ltige_Name_f0c666d6
data.value: Please fix name conflicts or invalid names in the preview.

data.name: Bitte_w_hle_einen_g_ltigen_Startordner_e4b5cad6
data.value: Please choose a valid starting folder.

data.name: F_r_eine_Collage_m_ssen_mindestens_zwei_Bilder_a_c6c8e71c
data.value: At least two images must be selected for a collage.

data.name: Alle_Einstellungen_dieses_Werkzeugs_zur_cksetzen_2e2e41e7
data.value: Reset all settings of this tool

data.name: Details_zur_cksetzen_Klarheit_Sch_rfe_Weichzeich_b653c056
data.value: Reset details: clarity, sharpness, blur, grain, and method

data.name: Gilt_f_r_Viewer_und_Editor_nur_verkleinern_wenn__913aae5e
data.value: Applies to viewer and editor: only shrink when the image is larger than the viewport, or always scale to the viewport.

data.name: Kantenl_nge_einer_Rasterzelle_im_Editor_in_Bildp_d827c2bc
data.value: Edge length of a grid cell in the editor, in image pixels.

data.name: Keine_cube_Dateien_im_Ordner_gefunden_9f94b650
data.value: No .cube files found in the folder

data.name: Keine_XMP_Dateien_im_Ordner_gefunden_cb2e7f02
data.value: No XMP files found in the folder

data.name: Lightroom_Preset_konnte_nicht_geladen_werden_4e8bbdf4
data.value: Lightroom preset could not be loaded:

data.name: Lineale_und_Hilfslinien_ein_oder_ausblenden_76c1102d
data.value: Show or hide rulers and guides

data.name: Raster_ein_oder_ausblenden_Gr_e_Einstellungen_Ed_089598b9
data.value: Show or hide the grid (size: Settings → Editor)

data.name: Schreibt_Details_zu_Vorschau_Wiedergabe_Fehlern__7ef8054a
data.value: Writes details about preview and playback errors to %LocalAppData%/FerrumPix/logs/diagnostics.log. Switch on only when troubleshooting.

data.name: Vergr_ert_oder_verkleinert_die_Schrift_der_Oberf_e14413e1
data.value: Enlarges or reduces the interface font in whole steps. Takes effect immediately.

data.name: Wie_viele_Vorschaubilder_maximal_gleichzeitig_im_d4e10972
data.value: How many thumbnails are kept in memory at the same time at most. Higher values reduce reloading while scrolling but need more memory.

data.name: bernimmt_EXIF_XMP_beim_Speichern_unter_Exportier_ca80d46d
data.value: Carries EXIF/XMP over when saving as, exporting, and converting.

data.name: Zauberstab_zusammenh_ngende_Farbfl_che_w_hlen_ba6e6e09
data.value: Magic wand: select a contiguous colour area

data.name: Auswahl_im_Bild_erstellen_dann_kopieren_oder_f_l_1e7b1755
data.value: Create a selection on the image, then copy or fill it.

data.name: Bild_konnte_nicht_aus_Immich_geladen_werden_d39194e5
data.value: Image could not be loaded from Immich

data.name: Immich_Fotos_konnten_nicht_geladen_werden_8e9fb949
data.value: Immich photos could not be loaded

data.name: Basis_Adresse_deiner_Immich_Instanz_z_B_http_nas_1f4bf0d1
data.value: Base address of your Immich instance, e.g. http://nas:2283

data.name: Im_Immich_Webinterface_unter_Konto_API_Keys_erze_06e36b46
data.value: Create it in the Immich web interface under Account → API keys.

data.name: Zeigt_den_Immich_Zweig_mit_deinen_Alben_im_Galer_a6b06c93
data.value: Shows the Immich branch with your albums in the gallery tree.

data.name: L_scht_die_lokal_zwischengespeicherten_Immich_Vo_2e79d5d5
data.value: Deletes the locally cached Immich thumbnails and the metadata index. Both are reloaded on demand.

data.name: Bindet_einen_self_hosted_Immich_Server_ein_Alben_57ede30d
data.value: Integrates a self-hosted Immich server. Albums appear in the gallery's navigation panel; photos can be viewed and edited (as a copy).

data.name: Speichert_FerrumPix_Bewertungen_in_einem_abgegre_d73d5de9
data.value: Stores FerrumPix ratings in a delimited block of the Immich description instead of the Immich rating field.

data.name: Speichert_FerrumPix_Stichw_rter_in_einem_abgegre_0b05b5ee
data.value: Stores FerrumPix keywords in a delimited block of the Immich description instead of as Immich tags.

data.name: L_scht_Dateien_und_Ordner_dauerhaft_statt_sie_in_b2d0c4bb
data.value: Deletes files and folders permanently instead of moving them to the trash.

data.name: L_scht_Dateien_und_Ordner_ohne_vorherige_Best_ti_e203327b
data.value: Deletes files and folders without a prior confirmation.

data.name: Blendet_die_Pixel_Lineale_am_oberen_und_linken_R_d309775e
data.value: Shows the pixel rulers along the top and left edges of the preview.

data.name: Zeigt_ein_Pixelraster_ber_dem_Bild_an_00968ceb
data.value: Shows a pixel grid over the image.

data.name: Gescanntes_Filmnegativ_umrechnen_die_orange_Mask_b17b0de4
data.value: Converts a scanned film negative: the orange mask of the film base is removed, then each channel is inverted.

data.name: F_r_S_W_Filme_das_Ergebnis_wird_neutral_grau_ein_25b16056
data.value: For B&W film: the result is neutral gray, so a tinted film base leaves no color cast.

data.name: Pipette_auf_den_unbelichteten_Filmrand_zwischen__a410569a
data.value: Eyedropper: click the unexposed film edge between the frames. The preview briefly shows the raw negative again.

data.name: Filmbasis_automatisch_aus_dem_Bild_messen_df13236a
data.value: Measure the film base from the image automatically

data.name: Steilheit_der_Dichtekurve_nach_links_flauer_und__1c1a692f
data.value: Steepness of the density curve: flatter and brighter to the left, punchier and darker to the right.

data.name: W_hle_den_Look_und_wohin_die_Bilder_geschrieben__99bb404c
data.value: Choose the look and where the images are written.

data.name: Schreibt_den_Filter_direkt_in_die_Bilddateien_Oh_7668ae3a
data.value: Writes the filter directly into the image files. Unchecked, new files are created and the originals stay untouched.

data.name: Namen_der_Vorgabe_an_den_Dateinamen_anh_ngen_a24135a3
data.value: Append the preset name to the file name

data.name: Die_gew_hlte_Vorgabe_konnte_nicht_gelesen_werden_119d34d3
data.value: The selected preset could not be read.

data.name: Bearbeitungen_ersetzen_das_Immich_Asset_aus_dem__beef823a
data.value: Edits replace the Immich asset they came from (albums, keywords, rating and favourite are kept; the original goes to the Immich trash). Only then does Save work for Immich images in the editor. Off: every edit creates a new asset via Save as.

data.name: L_schen_wirkt_in_Galerie_und_Betrachter_auch_auf_69dcc97d
data.value: Delete in the gallery and viewer also affects Immich assets - on the server, not just in the local view. Off: Immich images cannot be deleted.

data.name: Umgeht_den_Immich_Papierkorb_gel_schte_Assets_si_4eea5645
data.value: Bypasses the Immich trash: deleted assets are gone immediately and cannot be restored in the Immich web interface either.

data.name: L_schen_in_Immich_ist_in_den_Einstellungen_nicht_03de7033
data.value: Deleting in Immich is not allowed in the settings

data.name: Album_0_l_schen_Die_Fotos_darin_bleiben_in_Immic_16a8ca0d
data.value: Delete album {0}? The photos in it are kept in Immich.

data.name: Album_konnte_nicht_gel_scht_werden_4f27bc20
data.value: The album could not be deleted

data.name: Auswahl_im_Bild_erstellen_dann_kopieren_oder_f_l_f8265df4
data.value: Make a selection in the image, then copy or fill it. Ctrl+A selects everything, Ctrl+D deselects, Esc cancels while you are dragging.

data.name: Drehen_und_Spiegeln_wirken_auf_das_markierte_Obj_3f7bd53d
data.value: Rotate and flip act on the selected object. With no object selected, they act on the whole image.

data.name: Die_Regler_wirken_auf_das_markierte_Objekt_Ohne__f07120c1
data.value: The sliders act on the selected object. With no object selected, they act on the whole image.

data.name: L_sst_die_Auswahlkante_ber_die_angegebene_Anzahl_fc252c93
data.value: Fades the edge of the selection out over the given number of image pixels (0 = hard edge)

data.name: Bearbeitungen_ersetzen_das_Immich_Asset_aus_dem__cc8cfeea
data.value: Edits replace the Immich asset they came from (albums, tags, rating and favorite are preserved; the original goes to the Immich trash). Applies to Save AND to Save As with Immich as the target. Off: every edit creates a new asset.

data.name: Zeigt_Jahre_bzw_Anfangsbuchstaben_passend_zur_So_259307a7
data.value: Shows years or initial letters matching the sort order; click or drag jumps to that position.

data.name: Beim_Ziehen_an_den_Anfassern_bleibt_das_Verh_ltn_01a7585a
data.value: When dragging the handles, the width-to-height ratio is preserved - like in Image Size. Off: the image is stretched to the dragged size (Shift still forces the ratio).

data.name: Ebenen_Seitenleiste_im_Editor_anzeigen_11fbed0c
data.value: Show layers sidebar in the editor

data.name: Blendet_das_Ebenen_Panel_neben_der_Info_Leiste_e_145faa21
data.value: Shows or hides the layers panel next to the info sidebar.

data.name: Abstand_der_Zuschnittslinien_zu_den_Bildr_ndern__6e8138da
data.value: Distance of the crop lines from the image edges when the tool opens, in percent. 0 = lines sit on the edges.

data.name: Schreibt_die_neue_Gr_e_direkt_in_die_Bilddateien_e5ca016d
data.value: Writes the new size directly into the image files. Unchecked, new files are created with a format choice and the originals stay untouched.

data.name: bersicht_der_Tasten_und_Mausbelegung_in_Galerie__91d799e1
data.value: Overview of keyboard and mouse assignments in gallery, viewer and editor.

data.name: Bewertung_setzen_dieselbe_Zahl_erneut_oder_Strg__a67aab8f
data.value: Set rating (same number again or Ctrl+0 removes it)

data.name: Pfeiltasten_Bild_auf_ab_Pos1_Ende_089188b4
data.value: Arrow keys, Page Up/Down, Home, End

data.name: Zur_ck_zur_Galerie_im_Vollbild_Vollbild_verlasse_9acb05b5
data.value: Back to gallery (in fullscreen: leave fullscreen)

data.name: Objekt_duplizieren_ohne_Objekt_Auswahl_aufheben_56d12fa8
data.value: Duplicate object; without an object: clear selection

data.name: Objekt_l_schen_ohne_Objekt_Bild_l_schen_b5e9f927
data.value: Delete object; without an object: delete image

data.name: Auswahl_abw_hlen_Zug_abbrechen_Editor_verlassen_55efe80d
data.value: Deselect, cancel the current stroke, leave the editor

data.name: Startet_in_Immich_Alle_Fotos_ohne_Verbindung_gre_ff052108
data.value: Starts in Immich “All photos”; without a connection the Pictures folder is used

data.name: Abstand_der_Einrast_Linien_zu_den_Bildr_ndern_be_44954031
data.value: Distance of the snap lines from the image edges when moving objects, in percent. 0 = disabled; objects always snap to edges, centre and other objects.

data.name: Schreibt_das_Wasserzeichen_direkt_in_die_Bilddat_92c3da24
data.value: Writes the watermark directly into the image files. Without the check mark, new files are created and the originals remain untouched.

data.name: Es_gibt_ungespeicherte_nderungen_M_chtest_du_sie_2411d96a
data.value: There are unsaved changes. Do you want to save them?

data.name: Es_gibt_ungespeicherte_nderungen_M_chtest_du_sie_434baf9a
data.value: There are unsaved changes. Do you want to save them before you {0}?

data.name: Diese_fpx_Projektdatei_konnte_nicht_gelesen_werd_b476b06f
data.value: This .fpx project file could not be read.

data.name: Aus_dieser_RAW_Datei_konnte_keine_Vorschau_extra_29d7758a
data.value: No preview could be extracted from this RAW file.

data.name: Diese_Datei_konnte_nicht_ge_ffnet_werden_b5febe5c
data.value: This file could not be opened.

data.name: Soll_die_Drehung_von_0_gespeichert_werden_bevor__8a43f254
data.value: Save the rotation of {0} before you {1}?

data.name: Die_Auswahl_wird_als_PDF_aufbereitet_und_im_Stan_fac8442a
data.value: The selection is prepared as a PDF and opened in your default application - the familiar system print dialog appears there.

data.name: Das_ganze_Bild_passt_auf_die_Seite_Seitenverh_lt_876369b7
data.value: The whole image fits on the page, aspect ratio is preserved

data.name: Das_Bild_f_llt_die_Fl_che_vollst_ndig_aus_und_wi_e71e9f7c
data.value: The image fills the area completely and is cropped in the process

data.name: Dateinamen_unter_die_Bilder_setzen_2a827630
data.value: Show file names below the images

data.name: Das_PDF_konnte_nicht_erzeugt_oder_ge_ffnet_werde_fdf1038e
data.value: The PDF could not be created or opened.

data.name: Einige_Bilder_konnten_nicht_geladen_werden_c1dd9f54
data.value: Some images could not be loaded.

data.name: Der_Bearbeitungsstand_konnte_nicht_f_r_den_Druck_f53e0267
data.value: The current edit state could not be prepared for printing.

data.name: Randlos_drucken_Bild_f_llt_die_Seite_Rand_wird_b_426505b5
data.value: Borderless printing (image fills the page, edges are cropped)

data.name: Ohne_Seitenrand_Ob_wirklich_bis_an_die_Papierkan_63fb5733
data.value: No page margin. Whether printing really reaches the paper edge is up to the printer in the system print dialog.

data.name: Dasselbe_Bild_mehrfach_drucken_f_r_mehrere_Abz_g_f3cc97bc
data.value: Print the same image several times - for multiple prints on one page also set "Images per page".

data.name: Das_ausgew_hlte_Wasserzeichen_enth_lt_keinen_Tex_a7ed1bb8
data.value: The selected watermark contains neither text nor an image.

data.name: Lege_ein_leeres_Bild_an_oder_ffne_eine_vorhanden_932cb164
data.value: Create a blank image or open an existing file.

data.name: Das_leere_Bild_konnte_nicht_angelegt_werden_3284a6ef
data.value: The blank image could not be created.

data.name: Die_gew_nschte_Gr_e_ist_zu_gro_Erlaubt_sind_bis__27934ec9
data.value: The requested size is too large. Up to 30000 pixels per edge are allowed.

data.name: Legt_fest_was_erscheint_wenn_FerrumPix_ohne_ein__94a59cf0
data.value: Determines what appears when FerrumPix is opened without an image.

data.name: W_hle_eine_Vorgabe_oder_trage_eigene_Ma_e_ein_a6b96835
data.value: Choose a preset or enter your own dimensions.

data.name: Retusche_und_Pinsel_ein_ausblenden_ausgeblendet__602193a1
data.value: Show/hide retouching and brush (hiding locks the painting tools)

data.name: PSD_ohne_lesbares_Gesamtbild_in_Photoshop_mit_ma_fd7c8a13
data.value: PSD without a readable composite - save it in Photoshop with Maximize Compatibility

data.name: Keine_Vorschau_aus_dieser_RAW_Datei_extrahierbar_1240acf9
data.value: No preview could be extracted from this RAW file

data.name: Gl_ttet_nur_die_Farbanteile_Chroma_die_Helligkei_1c158f60
data.value: Smooths only the colour (chroma) components; luminance and therefore detail are preserved.

data.name: Positiv_f_gt_Staubk_rner_und_Kratzer_hinzu_Film__1d1681ed
data.value: Positive adds dust specks and scratches (film look); negative removes defects while preserving edges.

data.name: Positiv_f_gt_Rauschen_hinzu_negativ_reduziert_es_1decfbdc
data.value: Positive adds noise; negative reduces it (uniform smoothing).

data.name: Begleitdatei_konnte_nicht_geschrieben_werden_7f337000
data.value: Sidecar file could not be written

data.name: Noch_keine_Favoriten_Ordner_Immich_Eintr_ge_und__0f8084c9
data.value: No favourites yet. Right-click a folder, Immich entry or search list to add it here.

data.name: Das_Ziel_dieses_Favoriten_existiert_nicht_mehr_07e4e4a0
data.value: The target of this favourite no longer exists

data.name: Buchstaben_auf_der_Linie_umgeschlagen_Kopf_zur_K_843a54f9
data.value: Letters flipped on the line - tops facing the centre

data.name: FerrumPix_baut_auf_diesen_Projekten_auf_Die_Scha_c1b0fd1a
data.value: FerrumPix builds on these projects. The buttons open the respective licence text in your browser.

data.name: Datenbindung_der_Ansichtsmodelle_5d651ef3
data.value: Data binding for the view models

data.name: Datenbank_f_r_Bewertungen_Tags_und_Zwischenspeic_dcd39467
data.value: Database for ratings, tags and caches

data.name: LibRaw_und_libmpv_stehen_unter_der_LGPL_sie_werd_bf6db0e8
data.value: LibRaw and libmpv are licensed under the LGPL: they are used unmodified and loaded dynamically, and can be replaced with your own build of the same version. The licence texts and provenance records are in the licenses folder next to the application.

data.name: FerrumPix_baut_auf_diesen_Projekten_auf_Die_Scha_2a64a0ad
data.value: FerrumPix builds on these projects. The buttons open the project page and the licence text in your browser.

data.name: Ziehen_setzt_Farbton_und_S_ttigung_mit_Umschalt__8bcf3a0f
data.value: Drag to set hue and saturation; hold Shift for saturation only

data.name: Wirkt_auf_das_ganze_Bild_unabh_ngig_vom_Tonwert_ddd82eb2
data.value: Applies to the whole image, regardless of tone

data.name: Entfernt_Filter_LUT_und_Lightroom_Preset_dec8af39
data.value: Removes filter, LUT and Lightroom preset

data.name: Wirkgr_e_der_Sch_rfung_0_feine_Kanten_h_her_sch__de7a7353
data.value: Sharpening scale: 0 = fine edges, higher sharpens coarser structures.

data.name: Hebt_die_feinen_Details_bei_der_Sch_rfung_st_rke_195d5aa8
data.value: Emphasizes fine detail more strongly when sharpening.

data.name: Sch_tzt_Kanten_beim_Weichzeichnen_h_her_mehr_Det_43db4112
data.value: Protects edges when blurring: higher = more detail is preserved.

data.name: Korngr_e_0_feines_Korn_h_her_gr_ber_bae6e47b
data.value: Grain size: 0 = fine grain, higher = coarser.

data.name: Mischt_eine_feine_Lage_ein_h_her_unruhigeres_Kor_d5155e92
data.value: Blends in a fine layer: higher = more restless grain.

data.name: Wie_die_Vignette_abdunkelt_Farb_Priorit_t_h_lt_d_8eb754a8
data.value: How the vignette darkens: Color Priority keeps the color, Highlight Priority spares bright areas, Paint Overlay desaturates to a flat gray gradient.

data.name: Unregelm_igkeit_des_Korns_h_her_fleckiger_manche_d20eab69
data.value: Grain irregularity: higher = patchier (some areas grainier than others).
